LAW AND MOTION 302, EFENDANTS HARTLAND HOTEL AND TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS FOR PERSONAL INJURY. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING - MOTION DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH CAUSATION. FURTHERMORE, DEFENDANT RAISES AN ISSUE OF COMPARATIVE FAULT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO WILSON DECLARATION OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S REMEDY FOR DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE IS A MOTION TO COMPEL FOLLOWED BY A MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS HARTLAND HOTEL AND TENDERLOIN HOUSING CLINIC'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION OF PLAINTIFF'S CLAIMS FOR PERSONAL INJURY.

APPEARANCES: T. Troy Otus, Esq. of The Otus Law Group 650/548-2100 for pltf & opposing party; Jay W. Brown, Esq. of Clapp Moroney Bellagamba Vucinich 925/734-0990 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - MOTION DENIED, FAILURE TO SHIFT BURDEN OF PROOF. DEFENDANT FAILS TO ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF CANNOT ESTABLISH CAUSATION. FURTHERMORE, DEFENDANT RAISES AN ISSUE OF COMPARATIVE FAULT. DEFENDANT'S OBJECTION TO WILSON DECLARATION OVERRULED. DEFENDANT'S REMEDY FOR DISCOVERY COMPLIANCE IS A MOTION TO COMPEL FOLLOWED BY A MOTION FOR SANCTIONS. Order signed in open court. (302/CWW) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
